@echo off
setlocal
cd /d "%~dp0"
python scripts\forks\onepush_agent.py ed %*
exit /b %ERRORLEVEL%

@echo off
setlocal
cd /d "%~dp0"
python scripts\forks\onepush_agent.py edd %*
exit /b %ERRORLEVEL%

@echo off
setlocal
cd /d "%~dp0"
python scripts\forks\onepush_agent.py eddy %*
exit /b %ERRORLEVEL%

@echo off
setlocal
cd /d "%~dp0"
python scripts\forks\onepush_agent.py guy %*
exit /b %ERRORLEVEL%

# Onepush button contract

`onepush-<agent>.bat` is the single high-level submission button for an agent.

There are no mode words. The only behavioural switch is `--ship`.

Without `--ship`, onepush submits a checkpoint to the relevant lane and stops:

- gadget work goes to `gadget-agents/<gizmo>/<gadget>/<agent>`
- repository work goes to `agents/<agent>`

With `--ship`, onepush submits first when a source folder is supplied, then
amalgamates and syncs.

## Gadget checkpoint

```bat
onepush-edd.bat lambda-script lambda-script ^
  "C:\path\to\projects\lambda-script" ^
  --dest "projects\lambda-script" ^
  --replace ^
  --message "Checkpoint Haskell migration"
```

## Gadget ship

Ship existing lane work:

```bat
onepush-edd.bat --ship lambda-script lambda-script
```

Submit and ship in one call:

```bat
onepush-edd.bat --ship lambda-script lambda-script ^
  "C:\path\to\projects\lambda-script" ^
  --dest "projects\lambda-script" ^
  --replace ^
  --message "Sign over Haskell migration"
```

## Repository-agent checkpoint

```bat
onepush-edd.bat --repo "C:\path\to\folder" --dest "repo/path" --replace
```

## Repository-agent ship

```bat
onepush-edd.bat --ship --repo
```

## Durability invariant

A lane head is mutable. It may be rewound by a later signover. The durable unit is
the captured submission/replay materialisation. A `onepush` checkpoint must remain
recoverable even if a later `--ship` syncs the lane back to the integration ref.

Therefore shipping must capture the lane into the submission/replay stream before
any lane sync or rewind is allowed.

{
  "format": "LS_GIZMO_V1",
  "name": "lambdascript",
  "description": "Development gizmo for the LambdaScript compiler, interchange model, forks tooling, and gizmo tooling.",
  "gadgets": {
    "core": {
      "root": ".",
      "language": "mixed",
      "target_ref": "origin/gadgets/lambdascript/core/main",
      "integration_branch": "gadgets/lambdascript/core/main",
      "agent_branch_template": "gadget-agents/lambdascript/core/{agent}",
      "owned_paths": [
        "glc/",
        "examples/",
        "docs/core/",
        "docs/forks/",
        "scripts/forks/",
        "tools/gizmo/",
        "forks/",
        "forks.bat",
        "install.bat",
        "verify.bat",
        "ed-land-json.bat",
        "edd-land-json.bat",
        "eddy-land-json.bat",
        "guy-land-json.bat",
        "ed-sync-all.bat",
        "edd-sync-all.bat",
        "eddy-sync-all.bat",
        "guy-sync-all.bat",
        "gadget-creation-ed.bat",
        "gadget-creation-edd.bat",
        "gadget-creation-eddy.bat",
        "gadget-creation-guy.bat",
        "gadget-amalgamate-ed.bat",
        "gadget-amalgamate-edd.bat",
        "gadget-amalgamate-eddy.bat",
        "gadget-amalgamate-guy.bat",
        "agent-submit-ed.bat",
        "agent-submit-edd.bat",
        "agent-submit-eddy.bat",
        "agent-submit-guy.bat",
        "agent-amalgamate-ed.bat",
        "agent-amalgamate-edd.bat",
        "agent-amalgamate-eddy.bat",
        "agent-amalgamate-guy.bat",
        "onepush-ed.bat",
        "onepush-edd.bat",
        "onepush-eddy.bat",
        "onepush-guy.bat"
      ],
      "verification_profiles": {
        "quick": [
          "python -m py_compile scripts/forks/forks.py scripts/forks/forks_dispatch.py scripts/forks/submission_object.py scripts/forks/import_json_patch.py scripts/forks/land_json_patch.py scripts/forks/gadget_branches.py scripts/forks/gadget_land_json.py scripts/forks/gadget_verify_profiles.py scripts/forks/gadget_promote.py scripts/forks/ensure_node_toolchains.py scripts/forks/agent_land_json.py scripts/forks/main_history.py scripts/forks/replay_plan.py scripts/forks/replay_sync.py scripts/forks/accelerator.py scripts/forks/amalgamate_all.py scripts/forks/gadget_ingest_folder.py scripts/forks/gadget_creation_agent.py scripts/forks/gadget_amalgamate_safe.py scripts/forks/gadget_amalgamate_agent.py scripts/forks/agent_folder_submit.py scripts/forks/agent_amalgamate_agent.py scripts/forks/onepush_agent.py"
        ],
        "gizmo": [
          "python scripts/forks/ensure_node_toolchains.py --install --only tools/gizmo",
          "cd tools/gizmo && npm run build",
          "cd tools/gizmo && npm test"
        ],
        "glc-light": [
          "python scripts/forks/ensure_node_toolchains.py --install --only glc",
          "cd glc && npm test"
        ],
        "full": [
          "python scripts/forks/ensure_node_toolchains.py --install",
          "verify.bat"
        ]
      },
      "commands": {
        "forks": "forks.bat {args}",
        "glc": "cd glc && npm run glc -- {args}",
        "gizmo": "cd tools/gizmo && node dist/src/cli.js {args}",
        "accelerator": "forks.bat accelerator {args}",
        "gadget-creation-ed": "gadget-creation-ed.bat {args}",
        "gadget-creation-edd": "gadget-creation-edd.bat {args}",
        "gadget-creation-eddy": "gadget-creation-eddy.bat {args}",
        "gadget-creation-guy": "gadget-creation-guy.bat {args}",
        "gadget-amalgamate-ed": "gadget-amalgamate-ed.bat {args}",
        "gadget-amalgamate-edd": "gadget-amalgamate-edd.bat {args}",
        "gadget-amalgamate-eddy": "gadget-amalgamate-eddy.bat {args}",
        "gadget-amalgamate-guy": "gadget-amalgamate-guy.bat {args}",
        "agent-submit-ed": "agent-submit-ed.bat {args}",
        "agent-submit-edd": "agent-submit-edd.bat {args}",
        "agent-submit-eddy": "agent-submit-eddy.bat {args}",
        "agent-submit-guy": "agent-submit-guy.bat {args}",
        "agent-amalgamate-ed": "agent-amalgamate-ed.bat {args}",
        "agent-amalgamate-edd": "agent-amalgamate-edd.bat {args}",
        "agent-amalgamate-eddy": "agent-amalgamate-eddy.bat {args}",
        "agent-amalgamate-guy": "agent-amalgamate-guy.bat {args}",
        "onepush-ed": "onepush-ed.bat {args}",
        "onepush-edd": "onepush-edd.bat {args}",
        "onepush-eddy": "onepush-eddy.bat {args}",
        "onepush-guy": "onepush-guy.bat {args}"
      }
    },
    "wavproc": {
      "root": "tools/wavproc",
      "language": "mixed",
      "target_ref": "origin/gadgets/lambdascript/wavproc/main",
      "integration_branch": "gadgets/lambdascript/wavproc/main",
      "agent_branch_template": "gadget-agents/lambdascript/wavproc/{agent}",
      "owned_paths": [
        "tools/wavproc/",
        "docs/wavproc/"
      ],
      "verification_profiles": {
        "quick": [
          "cd tools/wavproc && cabal build"
        ],
        "full": [
          "cd tools/wavproc && cabal build",
          "cd tools/wavproc && cabal run wavproc -- --help"
        ]
      },
      "commands": {
        "wavproc": "cd tools/wavproc && cabal run wavproc -- {args}"
      }
    }
  },
  "imports": {}
}
